summary: The diff implements most of the requested requirements with good coverage. REQ-135, REQ-136, REQ-137, REQ-138, and REQ-139 appear substantially implemented. REQ-140 is not addressed — no image files were added to frontend/public/assets/generated/. Additionally, there are some partial gaps in REQ-136 (variant images use .dim_ filename paths not matching the exact filenames from REQ-140), and the Admin.tsx adds a third 'Product Catalog' tab not requested.

missing_requirements.requirement: Generate representative static images for all 33 product variants at frontend/public/assets/generated/ with exact filenames like rice-basmati.png, rice-sona-masoori.png, etc.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows no added image files at frontend/public/assets/generated/. The ProductDetail.tsx references .dim_400x300.png variants but the required filenames are plain .png files (e.g., rice-basmati.png). No image files appear in the added or modified file list.

hallucinated_features.description: A third 'Product Catalog' tab was added to the Admin page with a 'Seed/Re-seed Products' button to populate the backend with complete variant data.
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-138 only requested two tabs: 'Contact Submissions' and 'Orders'. The Product Catalog tab with seeding functionality was not requested.
